name: Jay Gilligan
cooked: oh that’s so awesome that it helped out! i don’t know what it is about the design of this design, i find the button combos fiddly, sometimes actually physically difficult to perform with my big hands… but regardless i find the workflow super fun and somehow intuitive in a way that i don’t with other devices that have equally random architecture. like the tp-7, i can’t wrap my head around it. but the TE stem player speaks to me somehow!
raw: oh that’s so awesome that it helped out! i don’t know what it is about the design of this design, i find the button combos fiddly, sometimes actually physically difficult to perform with my big hands… but regardless i find the workflow super fun and somehow intuitive in a way that i don’t with other devices that have equally random architecture. like the tp-7, i can’t wrap my head around it. but the TE stem player speaks to me somehow!
